hero.title: Houdini
hero.reason: In honor of World No Tobacco Day, a classic film about the life of Harry Houdini, who often incorporated anti-smoking tricks into his acts, fits the observance as it highlights a legendary figure who promoted healthy habits.
hero.blurb: This classic biographical drama brings to life the story of the renowned magician Harry Houdini, showcasing his incredible escape acts and his legacy that continues to inspire. With its historical significance and entertaining narrative, Houdini is a must-watch for fans of classic cinema.

released.title: Knocked Up
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this film still rules as a hilarious and heartfelt comedy that explores the consequences of a one-night stand, starring Seth Rogen and Katherine Heigl.
released.blurb: Knocked Up is a laugh-out-loud comedy that delves into the unexpected consequences of a wild night, bringing together two individuals from different walks of life. With its witty dialogue and authentic characters, this film is a standout in the romantic comedy genre.

birthday.title: A Prairie Home Companion
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Chris Cooper, born May 31, 1951, starring in this film as a memorable character, showcasing his versatility as an actor in a unique blend of music, comedy, and drama.
birthday.blurb: A Prairie Home Companion is a charming film that celebrates the power of radio and the human connection, featuring an ensemble cast, including Chris Cooper. With its captivating storytelling and memorable performances, this film is a must-watch for fans of independent cinema.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: A famously bad movie with terrible reviews, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is often cited as one of the worst films of the 2000s, making it a prime candidate for a Dumpster Dive.
awful.blurb: This action-packed disaster is a mess of poor acting, incoherent plot twists, and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a laughable example of how not to make an action film. If you're looking for a movie to ridicule, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is the perfect choice.
